title: Jira Epic Without Open Child Issues for Extended Period
dataSources: Jira issues denormalized with `child_open_count` from ETL or lookup
app: Nightly Jira REST export augmented with child counts in HEC
spl:
index=itsm sourcetype="jira:cloud:issues" OR sourcetype="jira:issue"
| where issue_type="Epic" AND epic_status IN ("To Do","In Progress")
| eval stale_d=(now()-updated_epoch)/86400
| where stale_d > 14 AND child_open_count=0
| table key, epic_name, project, stale_d
| sort -stale_d
description: Orphan epics mask portfolio reporting and waste capacity forecasts.
value: Keeps SAFe/PMO views honest by flagging empty epics.
implementation: Populate `child_open_count` via scheduled search into KV store lookup.

references.title: Source types — Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud
